title: Shaded clearing P4 knip export blocker
body: I opened claim 1cc4bff2 on agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/active-agents.ts and index.ts only. Purpose: remove accidental P4 exported surfaces that make repo-wide pnpm knip fail for Lofty/Radiant graph commits. I will not stage or open git:index/head while Lofty claim c2f7012c is live.
